job_title: Fall 2026: Applied AI & Analytics Co-op (July to December)
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Data Visualization, AI Development, Large Language Models (LLMs), Automation Workflows, Agent Frameworks
skill_match_scores: Data Visualization:1.0, AI Development:1.0, Large Language Models (LLMs):1.0, Automation Workflows:0.0, Agent Frameworks:1.0
must_have_quals: Must be currently enrolled in a bachelor's or master's program, or have graduated within the past year, Must be able to work a full-time, 40-hour-per-week schedule with a minimum of 3 days per week onsite in Miami, FL, Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker, or similar), Demonstrated experience building with AI (LLMs, automation workflows, agent frameworks, or prompt engineering) with examples you can speak to, Experience working with real-world or messy datasets, Working knowledge of SQL, Python, or similar tools through coursework or projects, Ability to approach problems in a structured and logical way, Interest in consumer products, retail, or e-commerce, Strong communication skills; ability to deliver effective presentations to all levels of management
preferred_quals: Ability to develop strong cross-functional relationships, Adopt a 'no delays' mentality in delivering against market needs/timing, Make quick, daily progress and continuously adapt to achieve results rather than requiring perfect planning, Brings rigor to data preparation, model assumptions, and analytical outputs; understands that the quality of an AI output is only as good as the quality of the input
core_responsibilities: Own the end-to-end scoping, analysis, and delivery of a defined business problem — from data gathering through insight communication, Design, iterate, and document AI prompts and workflows; take ownership of data preparation pipelines for assigned projects, Build and maintain dashboards, reports, or models that are actively used by internal teams — with full accountability for quality and accuracy, Identify trends, patterns, and insights within datasets and translate them into actionable recommendations, Use AI tools to improve efficiency and automate analytical workflows, Develop and test agentic workflow prototypes that reduce manual effort on high-friction business processes, Present findings and recommendations directly to team leads and business stakeholders, Identify data gaps or inconsistencies and propose solutions, not just flag them
job_summary: SharkNinja is a global product design and technology company that focuses on lifestyle solutions. They are seeking a Fall Co-op on the Applied AI & Analytics team to drive AI transformation through meaningful projects, allowing the intern to own their work from problem definition to solution deployment.
